meta.title: Claim Scope & Services - Asistenca
meta.description: Claims-first support for vehicle, property, and injury matters, with explicit guidance-only and referral boundaries.

hero.title: Vehicle, property, and injury claims first
hero.subtitle: Free Start and membership begin with the claim types we can support now. Guidance-only matters stay advisory, and out-of-scope matters are routed to the right next step.

scope.title: The launch scope is explicit before any staff handling starts
scope.subtitle: Use this view to see which matters fit the current launch recovery path, which ones stay guidance-only, and when Interdomestik switches to referral or opt-in legal routes.

launch.title: Handled now
launch.description: These claim types fit the launch recovery path when there is a plausible monetary outcome.
items: Personal injury claims with a monetary recovery path
launch.note: Free Start can prepare the pack. Membership adds human triage and document review before any accepted escalation.

guidance.title: Guidance only
guidance.description: These categories can still receive guidance or document review, but they do not enter success-fee recovery at launch.
items: Landlord disputes without a direct monetary recovery path
Wage withholding or employment disputes without a clear payout path
Repair enforcement or contract termination disputes without a direct payout
Broader consumer complaints outside the launch claim types
guidance.note: These matters stay advisory. We can help with the pack and one document review, then refer onward when a partner route makes more sense.

outOfScope.title: Out of scope
outOfScope.description: These matters are not part of the launch contract and are not accepted for staff handling.
items: General business disputes outside defined group packages
outOfScope.note: We do not accept these matters for staff handling. Where possible, we route you to a more suitable external provider.

boundary.title: Referral boundaries
boundary.body: Guidance-only and out-of-scope matters do not move into success-fee handling. They stay advisory, self-serve, membership guidance, or referral-only depending on the case.
items: External legal partner action requires a separate written opt-in after case acceptance.
Flight delay compensation stays outside the current launch path and returns in a later phase.

freeStart.title: Free Start is informational only
freeStart.body: Free Start gives you informational guidance, templates, and next-step tools. It does not start human review, legal advice, or staff-led recovery.

hotline.title: Hotline means routing and support
hotline.body: The hotline is for urgent routing, support, and next-step guidance. It does not mean immediate legal review, claim acceptance, or staff-led handling.

consultation.title: Included help before staff-led recovery
consultation.subtitle: What Free Start and membership include on the launch path

services.title: Free Start claim pack
services.description: Free Start gives you the eligibility check, confidence score, evidence checklist, first complaint letter, timeline, and pack delivery without starting human review.

services.title: Membership triage
services.description: Human triage response within 24 business hours after a completed claim pack, plus dashboard tracking.

services.title: Document review per matter
services.description: Membership includes one document review per matter so staff can confirm missing evidence and next-step guidance before any accepted escalation.

services.title: First complaint or insurer letter
services.description: The launch path includes the first complaint, insurer, or counterparty letter before negotiation work begins.

services.title: Hotline routing and support
services.description: Urgent routing and support stay available on the public and member surfaces, but hotline contact does not start legal review or case acceptance.

services.title: Guidance-only document help
services.description: Guidance-only disputes can still receive guidance packs and document review, but they stay outside success-fee recovery.

expertise.title: How staff-led escalation starts
expertise.subtitle: Staff-led handling begins only after review, acceptance, and agreement

services.title: Case acceptance comes first
services.description: Staff-led handling begins only after scope review confirms a launch claim, a plausible monetary recovery path, an identifiable counterparty or insurer, and enough evidence for review.

services.title: Recovery work starts after agreement
services.description: Insurer negotiation, counterparty negotiation, formal mediation, and active recovery follow-up start only after case acceptance and an escalation agreement.

legal.title: Separate opt-in and referral routes
legal.subtitle: What needs written opt-in, and what stays guidance-only or referral-only

services.title: Legal partner and hard-cost route
services.description: External legal partner action, court filing, expert reports, translations, medical opinions, and other hard costs require separate written opt-in after case acceptance.

services.title: Guidance-only and out-of-scope boundary
services.description: Guidance-only and out-of-scope matters do not move into success-fee handling. They stay advisory, self-serve, membership guidance, or referral-only depending on the case.

experts.title: Who supports this path
experts.subtitle: Claims triage, document review, and partner coordination on the existing launch surface

list.title: Claims triage
list.description: Scope review and next-step guidance once a completed pack reaches membership triage.

list.title: Document review
list.description: Evidence and document checks before any accepted escalation or separate legal opt-in.

list.title: Partner coordination
list.description: Referral and legal-partner handoff only when the matter fits the contract and the member opts in.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Start with the claim types we support now, or contact us for guidance and routing when your matter falls outside the launch scope.
